evals.prompt: Build me a todo app with React and SQLite backend
evals.expected_output: Agent identifies its orchestrator role, checks STATE.md, then invokes the `strategist` subagent (no REQUIREMENTS.md) or `architect` (if exists). Does NOT write code or specs itself.

evals.prompt: Continue working on my current feature
evals.expected_output: Agent checks `.ai/active/current/STATE.md`, reads last checkpoint, and resumes from the correct step by invoking the appropriate subagent. Does NOT start a new feature.

evals.prompt: I want to add user authentication to the existing app
evals.expected_output: Agent checks STATE.md (no active task), checks REQUIREMENTS.md (exists), then invokes the `architect` subagent to design the auth feature. Does NOT self-implement.
